questions.question: What does "Ontem fui ao cinema." mean in English?
options: I will go to the cinema
I went to the cinema yesterday
I am going to the cinema
questions.correct_answer: I went to the cinema yesterday

questions.question: What does "Ela estava a estudar quando chegou a polícia." mean in English?
options: She is studying when police arrives
She was studying when the police arrived
questions.correct_answer: She was studying when the police arrived
questions.audio: Ela estava a estudar quando chegou a polícia.

questions.question: What does "Vou comprar pão na padaria." mean in English?
options: I buy bread at the bakery
I will buy bread at the bakery
I bought bread at the bakery
I am buying bread at the bakery
questions.correct_answer: I will buy bread at the bakery

questions.question: What does "Quando vejo um filme antigo, gosto muito." mean in English?
options: When I see an old film, I like it a lot
When I saw an old film, I liked it
When I will see an old film, I will like it
When I am seeing an old film, I am liking
questions.correct_answer: When I see an old film, I like it a lot
questions.audio: Quando vejo um filme antigo, gosto muito.

questions.question: What does "O livro sobre história é interessante." mean in English?
options: The book in history is interested
The book of history is interesting
The book about history is interesting
questions.correct_answer: The book about history is interesting
questions.audio: O livro sobre história é interessante.

questions.question: What does "Não tenho mais dinheiro para comprar esse carro." mean in English?
options: I don't have much money to buy this car
I don't have any more money to buy this car
I have no money in the car
I don't buy cars with money
questions.correct_answer: I don't have any more money to buy this car
questions.audio: Não tenho mais dinheiro para comprar esse carro.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: Ontem ___ uma carta importante.
questions.correct_answer: recebi

questions.question: Complete the sentence: Se eu tivesse tempo, ___ contigo ao parque.
questions.correct_answer: iria

questions.question: Complete the sentence: Ela está ___ na cozinha.
questions.correct_answer: cozinhando

questions.question: Complete the sentence: O comboio ___ às 15h de Lisboa.
questions.correct_answer: parte

questions.question: Complete the sentence: Nós ___ para o trabalho de carro todos os dias.
questions.correct_answer: vamos

questions.question: Complete the sentence: Você ___ essa música antes?
questions.correct_answer: ouviu

questions.question: Listen and choose what you heard.
options: I am spending a week in Paris
I spent a week in Paris
I will spend a week in Paris
questions.correct_answer: I spent a week in Paris

questions.question: Listen and choose what you heard.
options: I went to the supermarket to buy food
I go to the supermarket to buy food
I will go to the supermarket to buy food
I am at the supermarket buying food
questions.correct_answer: I will go to the supermarket to buy food

questions.question: Listen and choose what you heard.
options: He was sleeping during the film
He has slept during the film
He had slept during the film
questions.correct_answer: He had slept during the film
questions.audio: Ele havia dormido durante o filme.

questions.question: Listen and choose what you heard.
questions.correct_answer: What was your profession before?
questions.audio: Qual era a sua profissão antes?

questions.question: Listen and choose what you heard.
options: The restaurant is near the station
The restaurant was near the station
The restaurant will be near the station
The restaurant has been near the station
questions.correct_answer: The restaurant was near the station
questions.audio: O restaurante ficava perto da estação.

questions.question: Listen and choose what you heard.
options: I visit five countries in two years
I have visited five countries in two years
I will visit five countries in two years
I am visiting five countries in two years
questions.correct_answer: I have visited five countries in two years
questions.audio: Já visitei cinco países em dois anos.

questions.question: Translate to target language: "Yesterday I bought a new shirt."
options: Ontem vou comprar uma camisa nova.
Ontem estava comprando uma camisa nova.
questions.correct_answer: Ontem comprei uma camisa nova.

questions.question: Translate to target language: "I was living in the countryside before."
options: Estou a viver no campo antes.
questions.correct_answer: Vivia no campo antes.

questions.question: Translate to target language: "They were going to travel in August."
questions.correct_answer: Eles iam viajar em agosto.

questions.question: Translate to target language: "If you had studied, you would have passed."
questions.correct_answer: Se tivesses estudado, terias passado.

questions.question: Translate to target language: "She has been working here for three years."
options: Ela trabalha aqui há três anos.
Ela trabalhava aqui há três anos.
Ela trabalhou aqui há três anos.
Ela estará trabalhando aqui há três anos.
questions.correct_answer: Ela trabalha aqui há três anos.

questions.question: Translate to target language: "The patient is being examined by the doctor."
options: O doente é examinado pelo médico.
O doente está sendo examinado pelo médico.
O doente foi examinado pelo médico.
O doente será examinado pelo médico.
questions.correct_answer: O doente está sendo examinado pelo médico.

questions.question: Você vai a um restaurante. O garçom pergunta: 'Que deseja beber?' Qual resposta é apropriada?
options: Um suco de laranja, por favor.
questions.correct_answer: Um suco de laranja, por favor.

questions.question: Seu colega diz 'Vou viajar para o Brasil no próximo mês.' Como você responde naturalmente?
questions.correct_answer: Que legal! Quando vai?

questions.question: Você está em uma loja. O vendedor pergunta 'Qual é o seu tamanho?' O que responde?
questions.correct_answer: Uso tamanho M.

questions.question: Seu amigo chega atrasado. O que você diz?
questions.correct_answer: Demoraste muito!

questions.question: Você vê um acidente na rua. O que faz primeiro?
options: Chamo a polícia e oferço ajuda.
questions.correct_answer: Chamo a polícia e oferço ajuda.

questions.question: Um colega diz 'Passei na prova de português!' Como você responde?
questions.correct_answer: Parabéns! Fico feliz por ti.
